feedback.text: I would like to express concern with regards to Google planning to block installing apps on Android. In my opinion this is an unfair invasion of freedom in devices that I bought. I do not believe there is any reason why a corporation should have any control over software that is installed on my own device. If such a thing were to happen on a standard computer I would change the operating system however for mobile devices this is not an option, which I would also say is an issue for digital fairness.
